channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Critics accuse Georgia sheriff of silencing them on social media in lawsuit
item.description: Social media critics of Cobb County Sheriff Craig Owens are accusing him in a lawsuit of violating their free speech rights on Facebook.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: US charges one of the world's richest people with fraud
item.description: Indian businessman Gautam Adani, one of the world's richest people, was charged by the U.S. on allegations of fraud.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, KREX 5

item.title: Man wins $650K on lottery ticket using numbers tied to late wife
item.description: A Chicago man won a $650,000 Lucky Day Lotto jackpot prize after playing numbers related to his late wife.
item.dc:creator: Marisa Rodriguez, ABC 4

item.title: Australian tourist dies after drinking tainted alcohol in Laos, raising toll to 4 including American
item.description: VIENTIANE, Laos (AP) — An Australian teenager has died after drinking tainted alcohol in Laos in what Australia’s prime minister on Thursday called every parent’s nightmare.
item.dc:creator: DAVID RISING and JINTAMAS SAKSORNCHAI, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: No charges filed against man arrested after teens set up sting
item.description: A 46-year-old California man ambushed by vigilante teens after he allegedly provided a girl with nude photos of himself and tried to arrange a sexual encounter with her is, so far, not facing charges.
item.dc:creator: Josh DuBose, KREX 5

item.title: Police in Finland arrest five suspects over separatist violence in southeast Nigeria
item.description: HELSINKI, Finland (AP) — Police in Finland said Thursday they had detained five suspects in connection with deadly violence in southeastern Nigeria and were seeking a court extension of the detensions.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: City of Asheville lifts boil water notice seven weeks after Helene
item.description: Hurricane Helene damaged water lines at the North Forth Reservoir, Asheville's water source, forcing residents to rely on bottled water for close to 55 days.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Soriano, NewsNation

item.title: Death toll in Gaza from Israel-Hamas war passes 44,000, Palestinian officials say
item.description: DEIR AL-BALAH, Gaza Strip (AP) — The death toll in the Gaza Strip from the 13-month-old war between Israel and Hamas has surpassed 44,000, local health officials said Thursday.
item.dc:creator: WAFAA SHURAFA and FATMA KHALED, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Republicans expand House majority with key victory and more top headlines
item.description: Get all the stories you need-to-know from the most powerful name in news delivered first thing every morning to your inbox.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The Chicano Squad’s impact on Houston after the Moody Park Riots
item.description: The Moody Riots proved Houston’s Hispanic community had a major trust problem when it came to police. That’s when the Houston Police Department formed a special task force -- The Chicano Squad.
item.dc:creator: Daniella Guzman, KPRC 2

item.title: CMA Awards: 2024 Winners | LIST
item.description: Keep up with all the biggest winners and moments from Country Music’s Biggest Night™ at the 58th Annual CMA Awards live from Nashville, TN!
item.dc:creator: Sebastian Posey, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Police report reveals assault allegations against Hegseth, Trump's pick for defense secretary
item.description: A woman told police that she was sexually assaulted in 2017 by Pete Hegseth after he took her phone, blocked the door to a California hotel room and refused to let her leave.
item.dc:creator: Martha Mendoza, Brian Slodysko And Juliet Linderman, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: The FBI arrested a man who's been charged with planning an attack on the New York Stock Exchange
item.description: A Florida man was arrested Wednesday and charged with a plot to “reboot” the U.S. government by planting a bomb at the New York Stock Exchange this week and detonating it with a remote-controlled device, according to the FBI.
item.dc:creator: HALLIE GOLDEN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Lawsuit against troopers who investigated 11-year-old in murder case nears trial
item.description: More than six years after he was exonerated based on insufficient evidence, a man who was charged as an 11-year-old with shooting his father's pregnant fiancee to death wants a federal jury to make the Pennsylvania State Police pay for the years he spent in juvenile detention.
item.dc:creator: MARK SCOLFORO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Man convicted of killing Laken Riley sentenced to life in prison without parole
item.description: ATHENS, Ga. (AP) — The Venezuelan man convicted of killing Georgia nursing student Laken Riley has been sentenced to life in prison without the possibility of parole in a case that became a flashpoint in the national debate over immigration.
item.dc:creator: KATE BRUMBACK, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Army veteran hopes to help others with a new career on the golf course
item.description: An Army vet caddying at well-known golf resorts realized the healing effects golf could have for veterans transitioning to civilian life.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Hubbard, NewsNation

item.title: Bryan Kohberger can face death penalty if convicted in Idaho college slayings
item.description: Bryan Kohberger, the man accused of killing four University of Idaho students in 2022, can face the death penalty, a judge ruled Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Texas justices of the peace date back 200 years, still investigate deaths today
item.description: The justice of the peace originated in England and has been an “institution in Texas since the earliest days of the colony,” introduced 200 years ago.
item.dc:creator: Arezow Doost, NewsNation

item.title: Human smuggling trial witness says he was separated from a family hours before they froze to death
item.description: FERGUS FALLS, Minn. (AP) — An Indian national who survived a treacherous trek across the U.S.-Canada border in blizzard conditions testified Wednesday that he got separated from a family of four shortly before they froze to death.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Ex-student pleads guilty to fatally shooting 3 University of Virginia football players in 2022
item.description: RICHMOND, Va. (AP) — A former University of Virginia student pleaded guilty Wednesday to fatally shooting three football players and wounding two other students on the campus in 2022. Christopher Darnell Jones Jr.
item.dc:creator: BEN FINLEY and DENISE LAVOIE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Meta's Threads app launches custom feeds amid Bluesky surge
item.description: The rollout came just days after Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg announced last week that Threads was testing the new feature.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, KRON4

item.title: Lyft driver allegedly tried to scam woman after 'imaginary child' peed on seat
item.description: "My gosh, I walked through the grass. Was there something on my shoes?" she said. "So I looked at the bottom of my shoes: completely clean.
item.dc:creator: Seth Kaplan, NewsNation

item.title: Pamela Hayden, longtime 'Simpsons' voice actor, hangs up her mic
item.description: “It’s been an honor and a joy to have worked on such a funny, witty, and groundbreaking show,” Hayden said in a statement.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Mountain lion killed by Missouri deer hunter, investigation underway
item.description: "The Department does not condone the indiscriminate killing of mountain lions, but we understand the need to allow people to protect livestock and human safety if they are threatened," said MDC.
item.dc:creator: Joey Schneider, NewsNation

item.title: Pennsylvania man accused of stalking woman for 14-years
item.description: Mathew Bryce Parkinson, 51, allegedly harassed the woman at her workplace, a shop in State College, beginning around 2015.
item.dc:creator: Trevor Miller, NewsNation

item.title: Vancouver Fire rescues boater, pet at Marine Park Boat Launch amid choppy conditions
item.description: The fire crew made contact with the man in the 32-foot sailboat partially tied to the “very unsteady dock.
item.dc:creator: Danny Peterson, NewsNation

item.title: Here's how much Thanksgiving dinner will cost this year
item.description: Here's which Thanksgiving dishes will cost more, and less, this year, according to the American Farm Bureau Federation.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Dorn, NewsNation

item.title: Watch: Dead at 13, her strangulation casts doubt on Texas’ antiquated inquest system
item.description: It is a unique, widely-used, antiquated process that still exists today after two centuries, foreshadowing a renewed debate among state leaders.
item.dc:creator: Josh Hinkle, NewsNation

item.title: Musk, Ramaswamy lay out plans for 'mass' federal layoffs, rule rollbacks under Trump
item.description: Tech entrepreneurs Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy said Wednesday that their brand-new government efficiency panel will identify “thousands” of regulations for President-elect Donald Trump to eliminate, which they argue will justify “mass head-count reductions” across government.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Almost 100 House Democrats push for Gaetz Ethics report’s release
item.description: Nearly 100 House Democrats wrote to the House Ethics Committee, urging them to publish its report on former Rep. Matt Gaetz (R-Fla.) and their investigation into his alleged misconduct after President-elect Trump nominated him to serve as attorney general.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, KRON4

item.title: Trial starts for New Hampshire youth center worker accused of holding down boy while he was raped
item.description: MANCHESTER, N.H. (AP) — A man who says he was brutally raped as a teenager by workers at a New Hampshire youth center testified Tuesday that he couldn't report the attack at the time because the perpetrators were responsible for his welfare. “They just did that to you.
item.dc:creator: NICK PERRY, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: These are the best cruise lines for 2025
item.description: If you're looking to spend a vacation at sea but haven't decided which cruise line is best for your specific needs, a new online ranking shows the best options for every type of traveler, from families to luxury seekers. U.S.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Donald Trump to nominate Dr. Oz for Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump plans to nominate former Pennsylvania Senate nominee Dr. Mehmet Oz to serve as the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services (CMS) Administrator.
item.dc:creator: George Stockburger, KRON4

item.title: Trump chooses TV doctor Mehmet Oz to lead Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump says he is nominating Dr. Mehmet Oz, who hosted a long-running television talk show, to lead the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services.
item.dc:creator: FATIMA HUSSEIN, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Another rare 'doomsday fish' discovered off Southern California coast for the third time this year
item.description: Another oarfish has made its way from the deep sea to the coast of San Diego County in Southern California.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, KTLA 5

item.title: National Geographic names 2024 Pictures of the Year
item.description: Emperor penguins taking the plunge, an Arkansas family experiencing a total solar eclipse, and a scientist holding a rare white rhino fetus are among the most striking and important images captured this year, according to National Geographic.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Rare coin found in piece of furniture sells for $2.52M at auction
item.description: A rare 17th Century coin sold at auction for a record-breaking $2.52 million eight years after it was found in an old cabinet.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Tanner, Fox 5
